since_last: 55% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.41%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.84% · BTC -1.07% · Gold -2.26% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 55% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.41%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.41%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INOD is the standout at -9.77%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +8.78%, SMCI +8.32%, INTC +7.74%, KLAC +7.41%, CEVA +7.20%. Laggards: INOD -9.77%, IBM -6.37%, SPCX -5.35%, MDB -5.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.35% at $181.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
